reviews.comment:
Precio calidad accesible, es bastante completa. Recomendable y atención muy amable de las chicas.

(Translated by Google)
Great value for money, and it's quite comprehensive. Highly recommended, and the staff is very friendly.

reviews.comment:
El Personal Excelentes,  voy hace 12 años,  si playeros ocupado vienen de oficina a atender, simpatía para regalar

(Translated by Google)
The staff is excellent, I've been going for 12 years. If the beach is busy, they come from the office to serve you; they're incredibly friendly.

reviews.comment:
Me gustaría saber x qué no quiere vender nafta en bidones yo quiero re vender aquí en el campo la nafta aquí te matan con el precio somos pobre  den una oportunidad  cuando ba mi hermano así pueda rebuscarme aquí  soy de Santiago el arenal dpto jimenez

(Translated by Google)
I'd like to know why you don't want to sell gasoline in jerrycans. I want to resell it here in the countryside. The price here is exorbitant; we're poor. Please give me a chance when my brother comes so I can make a living here. I'm from Santiago, El Arenal, Jiménez department.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8171823765692458471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGaHBfYmdBRRAB
